content:
@Victoria Lubitch thanks for looking into my feedback at https://github.com/IQSS/dataverse/pull/11507#pullrequestreview-4449905382 about prepending "geo" or "spatial" to generic field names like "distribution".

@Julian Gautier do you have a preference for "geo" or "spatial" or something else?
Hey @Philip Durbin 🚀 . You asked in the PR too so I've been replying there.
"geo" seems sensible to me, short and consistent with the block.

@Philip Durbin 🚀 and @Victoria Lubitch, can y'all look at the PR where I was first pinged? In the PR I wrote a bit about this and other things about the metadata block and I'm worried they haven't been seen

Maybe we should add "geographic" to the beginning of each field name instead, like geographicDataLineageStatement, instead of "geo".

The three fields that are in the metadata block now all start with "geographic", like geographicCoverage and geographicUnit.
Yep, as discussed elsewhere, that's what we're going with. Good suggestion. Thanks!
